Name: SPCR Brahman Bull Stud Token – 12 Registered Bulls
Description: 12 registered Brahman stud bulls, AI-tested, DNA-profiled with Zambia Beef Association. Average BW EBV +45. Herd base at Choma Ranch, Southern Province.

Name: SPCR Brahman Cow Herd Token – 380 Breeding Cows
Description: 380 registered Brahman breeding cows, 3-6 years, calving rate 89%. Vaccinated for FMD, Brucellosis, Anthrax. Ear-tagged and blood-typed. Southern Province Cattle Ranch, Choma.
LockedReason: Pledged as collateral – Standard Chartered Zambia farm finance

Name: SPCR Hereford-Brahman Cross Steers – 220 head (Feedlot)
Description: 220 Hereford-Brahman cross steers, 18-24 months, currently on feedlot finishing ration at 2.2kg ADG. Target slaughter weight 500kg. Supplied to Zambeef Plc Choma abattoir.

Name: SPCR Hereford Heifer Token – 95 Heifers (Replacement Stock)
Description: 95 Hereford replacement heifers, 12-18 months, for breeding herd expansion. Vaccinated and dewormed. Pre-screened for congenital defects. Valued at ZMW 8,200 per head.

Name: SPCR Nguni Cattle Token – 130 Nguni Breeding Cows
Description: 130 Nguni cattle (indigenous breed), 3-7 years, selected for tick resistance and drought tolerance. Used for agro-pastoral rotational grazing demonstration. East block of the ranch.

Name: SPCR Ranch Horses – 8 Working Quarter Horses
Description: 8 Quarter Horse geldings and mares, 3-10 years, trained for cattle mustering and herding. Registered with Zambia Horse Association. Stabled at main homestead paddock.

Name: SPCR Dorper Sheep Flock – 260 Ewes & Rams
Description: 260 Dorper sheep (230 ewes, 30 rams), registered with Zambia Dorper Sheep Association. 6-monthly lambing cycle, lamb crop 175%. Pasture-raised on ranch southern paddocks.

Name: SPCR Kalahari Red Goat Herd – 180 Does & Bucks
Description: 180 Kalahari Red goats (160 does, 20 bucks), for lean meat production. Twin-bearing rate 65%. Managed on rotational grazing in thornbush paddocks. Valued at ZMW 2,100 per head.

Name: Ranch Block North – Title Deed 850ha Grazing Land
Description: Freehold title for Ranch Block North, 850 hectares of natural thorn-bush savanna with established watering points. Title No. LSD/CHM/2019/045. Choma district, Southern Province.
LockedReason: Pledged as collateral – Standard Chartered Zambia farm finance

Name: Ranch Block South – Title Deed 620ha Grazing Land
Description: Freehold title for Ranch Block South, 620 hectares mixed miombo/grassland with seasonal wetlands (dambos). Includes stock watering dams. Title No. LSD/CHM/2019/046.

Name: Ranch Block East – Title Deed 420ha Pasture Land
Description: Freehold title for Ranch Block East, 420 hectares of improved Star Grass pasture with game fence. Used for Nguni cattle rotational grazing. Title No. LSD/CHM/2021/018.

Name: Ranch Homestead Plot – Title Deed 12ha Home Block
Description: Freehold title for homestead block, 12 hectares including main house, manager's house, feedlot pens, bomas, feed store and workshop. Title No. LSD/CHM/2018/009.

Name: Isuzu FTR 900 Cattle Truck – 6-Tonne Livestock Body
Description: 2021 Isuzu FTR 900 truck with custom 6-tonne steel livestock body, padded partitions, water tank and loading ramp. Licensed for livestock transport. Plates: ABB 4531 LSK.

Name: Gallagher Plunge Dip Tank System – Capacity 50,000L
Description: Concrete plunge dip tank, 50,000-litre capacity, with Gallagher dosing system and drip-return paddock. Treated for East Coast Fever, ticks and mange. Used for whole herd dipping monthly.

Name: Keenan Klassik 10 Total Mixed Ration Feed Mixer
Description: Keenan Klassik 10 TMR horizontal feed mixer, 10m³ capacity, with precision load cells and Keenan FeedManager software. Used for feedlot ration preparation. PTO-driven.

Name: Kubota M5-111 Utility Tractor (S/N: KM5111A00135)
Description: 2022 Kubota M5-111 tractor, 111hp, 4WD, with front loader and rear linkage. Used for feeding, silage, and general farm operations. Air-conditioned cab.

Name: Boschoff HS10 Livestock Trailer – 10-Tonne Capacity
Description: Boschoff HS10 double-deck sheep/cattle trailer, 10-tonne GVM, air-brakes. Used for livestock movements within ranch blocks and local transport to markets.

Name: Solar-Powered Borehole Pump System #1 – North Block
Description: Franklin Electric 7.5kW submersible borehole pump, 5kW solar PV array, 20,000L galvanized header tank. Provides water for cattle and game on the north ranch block. Flow: 12 m³/hr.

Name: Lucerne Hay Bales Receipt – 3,200 Bales (128 Tonnes)
Description: FRA-registered hay storage receipt for 3,200 large round bales of premium Lucerne hay, 40kg each, stored in covered shed on farm. Tested protein 22%. Used as winter supplementary feed.

Name: Maize Silage Receipt – 850 Tonnes Stored in 2 Drive-Over Bunkers
Description: ZFC-witnessed silage inventory receipt. 850 tonnes of whole-plant maize silage, DM 32%, ensiled June 2025, stored in 2 compacted drive-over bunkers at home block. Used for feedlot ration.

Name: Cattle Feed Supplement Stock – 24 Tonnes Protein Lick Blocks
Description: ZARI-approved protein lick block supplement inventory, 24 tonnes, stored in locked feed store on homestead block. Mineral/salt/urea blend for supplementing cattle on dry-season grazing.

Name: Bush Honey Apiary – 60 Log Hives (Miombo Woodland Honey)
Description: 60 traditional log hive apiary units installed in miombo woodland on the south ranch block. Apis mellifera monticola (mountain bee). Annual yield: 2.4 tonnes of raw bush honey. Registered with ZICM.

Name: Langstroth Honey Hive Apiary – 40 Modern Hives
Description: 40 Langstroth 10-frame hives using improved Zambian bee stock. Located near ranch homestead fruit garden. Annual yield: 2.0 tonnes extracted honey. Honey sold via Zambia Honey Council market.

Name: Kafue Tributary Borehole License – 120,000 m³/annum
Description: WARMA-issued water license Permit No. WARMA/GW/SPN/0205. Authorized extraction of 120,000 m³/annum from borehole fed by Kafue River quaternary aquifer for feedlot and garden irrigation.

Name: Gallagher Solar Electric Fence – Ranch Perimeter (28km)
Description: Gallagher M10,000i solar energizer powering a 28km 7-wire electric perimeter fence around the home and north ranch blocks. 10,000V output, tamper-alert GSM modem. Installed 2024.
